features: CONNECT HEADPHONES - Built for both worlds, the Connect wireless headphones offer a foldable design, removable microphone, voice assistant, and superior sound quality to give an enhanced audio experience for those at the office and those on their couch

DYNAMIC SOUND WITH BY SUPER BASS - Enjoy audio the way you're meant to thanks to responsive 40mm drivers that deliver a powerful, dynamic sound with a punchy bass and clear, natural vocals. Balanced sound for a complete listening experience

30 HOURS WIRELESS PLAYBACK - A long battery life gives you plenty of time to let you enjoy your music, audiobooks, podcasts, or chosen audio with crystal clear sound for up to 30 hours with every full charge. Charges with the included charging cable

PRACTICAL DESIGN - Features an omnidirectional boom microphone that's flexible and will provide clear audio input for all calls and a folding design that's compact and portable, making the Connect great for both travel and working from home or the office

FOR WORK & PLAY - Whether you're wanting to put your feet up, relax, and stream your favourite music or you're wanting that bump in audio quality for online meetings and video calls, the Connect is ideal for both your private life and your work life
description: From the manufacturer 30 HOURS WIRELESS PLAYBACK Just connect any Bluetooth enabled device and go! The combination of high frequency drivers and acoustic engineering allow for crystal clear sound wherever your are. POWERFUL SOUND Thanks to the 40mm high-quality drivers you can relax and enjoy listening to your favourite music with powerful bass and perfect and treble acoustics. FOR WORK & PLAY Whether you're wanting to put your feet up, relax, and stream your favourite music or you're wanting that bump in audio quality for online meetings and video calls, the Connect is ideal for both your private life and your work life. DETACHABLE BOOM MICROPHONE Flexible Omnidirectional Boom Microphone for clear audio & video calls. Ideal for working from home or office. VOICE ASSISTANT Users to interact with their smartphones or smart devices hands-free by issuing voice commands. HANDS-FREE MICROPHONE It allows users to speak without holding a physical microphone, enabling convenient and unrestricted movement during conversations or presentations. SOFT EAR PADS Soft ear pads are cushioned coverings designed for the ear cups of headphones or earphones.
